title: Fix PLI/DPI user defined system task/function grammar (#4587)

features.name: user defined system task identifier starting with dollar-digit
features.description: Code should include a user-defined system task call where the identifier starts with $ followed by a digit (e.g., $0, $1test)

features.name: user defined system function identifier starting with dollar-digit
features.description: Code should include a user-defined system function call where the identifier starts with $ followed by a digit (e.g., $f0, $9abc)
